service_offerings.name: Mobile Patrols
service_offerings.description: Scheduled and on-demand vehicle patrols for campuses, offices, and warehouses with customizable nightly coverage windows.

service_offerings.name: Video Surveillance Monitoring
service_offerings.description: 24/7 remote video monitoring with incident verification, escalation workflows, and recording health checks.

service_offerings.name: Alarm System Health Check
service_offerings.description: Proactive on-site inspection and testing of intrusion, fire, and panic alarm systems.

service_offerings.name: On-site Emergency Response Training
service_offerings.description: Instructor-led emergency response drills and skills, including CPR, evacuation, and incident reporting, delivered at your site.

service_offerings.name: Online Safety Orientation
service_offerings.description: Self-paced online safety orientation for new hires covering core emergency procedures and reporting expectations.

service_offerings.name: Security Risk Assessments
service_offerings.description: Comprehensive assessments of physical security, emergency procedures, and technology coverage across your facilities.

sites.name: Research Center - West
sites.description: R&D campus with specialized labs and stricter emergency response protocols.

sites.description: Regional distribution hub with extensive loading docks and truck staging areas.

sites.name: Training Center - Main
sites.description: Dedicated training center equipped for emergency response simulations and classroom instruction.

sites.name: Warehouse 7
sites.description: Medium-capacity warehouse with shared security resources and periodic fire drills.

sites.name: Uptown Office
sites.description: Client-facing office location with reception, meeting spaces, and visitor management systems.

sites.name: Remote Depot 3
sites.description: Remote storage depot with limited staff presence and reliance on mobile patrols and remote monitoring.

training_programs.name: On-site Emergency Response Training
training_programs.description: Three-hour instructor-led session at your facility covering CPR, first aid, evacuation, and emergency communications for employee groups.

training_programs.name: Online CPR & AED Certification
training_programs.description: Self-paced online course with virtual skills assessment covering adult CPR and AED usage.

training_programs.name: Workplace Violence Prevention Workshop
training_programs.description: Interactive workshop focusing on recognizing warning signs, de-escalation techniques, and reporting procedures.

training_programs.name: Fire Warden Training
training_programs.description: Specialized training for designated fire wardens on evacuation coordination and fire safety responsibilities.

training_programs.name: Blended Emergency Warden Program
training_programs.description: Combined online and practical program for floor wardens and safety champions, including tabletop exercises.

mobile_patrol_plans.name: Downtown Campus Overnight Patrol - Budget (5 nights)
mobile_patrol_plans.description: Vehicle-based perimeter and parking lot patrols for the Downtown Campus, 8 hours per night, Monday through Friday.

mobile_patrol_plans.name: Downtown Campus Overnight Patrol - Value (5 nights)
mobile_patrol_plans.description: Enhanced overnight patrol coverage including interior building checks for Building A and adjacent parking lots.

mobile_patrol_plans.name: Downtown Campus Late Night Patrol - Economy (5 nights)
mobile_patrol_plans.description: Economy late-night patrols between midnight and 6 AM focused on parking lots and loading docks.

mobile_patrol_plans.name: Downtown Campus Extended Patrol - Premium (7 nights)
mobile_patrol_plans.description: Full overnight coverage with 10-hour patrols every night, including lock-up and unlock services.

mobile_patrol_plans.name: Warehouse 12 Overnight Patrol (7 nights)
mobile_patrol_plans.description: Nightly patrols for Warehouse 12 with exterior checks, dock area sweeps, and alarm response.

mobile_patrol_plans.name: Remote Depot Night Patrol (3 nights)
mobile_patrol_plans.description: Low-frequency patrols for Remote Depot 3 focused on perimeter checks and gate integrity.

mobile_patrol_plans.name: Uptown Office Evening Patrol (5 nights)
mobile_patrol_plans.description: Evening patrols for Uptown Office focusing on lobby, parking garage entrances, and exterior doors.

mobile_patrol_plans.name: HQ North Campus Overnight Patrol (7 nights)
mobile_patrol_plans.description: Continuous nightly patrol coverage for Headquarters - North Campus including parking structures and loading bays.

monitoring_packages.name: Essential 24/7 Monitoring - 10 Cameras
monitoring_packages.description: Continuous 24/7 remote monitoring for up to 10 cameras with basic incident verification and call-out.

monitoring_packages.name: Standard 24/7 Monitoring - 12 Cameras
monitoring_packages.description: 24/7 monitoring with advanced analytics and priority response for up to 12 cameras.

monitoring_packages.name: Night Shield Monitoring - 16 Cameras
monitoring_packages.description: Night-only monitoring for larger sites with up to 16 cameras, from 18:00 to 06:00 daily.

monitoring_packages.name: Business Hours Monitoring - 8 Cameras
monitoring_packages.description: Monitoring from 07:00 to 19:00 for small offices and retail locations.

monitoring_packages.name: Enterprise 24/7 Monitoring - 20 Cameras
monitoring_packages.description: Enterprise-grade 24/7 monitoring for up to 20 cameras with dedicated account management.

monitoring_packages.name: Custom Flex Monitoring Plan
monitoring_packages.description: Configurable monitoring windows and camera counts tailored to multi-site deployments.

policies.title: Workplace Violence Response
policies.summary: Current corporate standard for recognizing, reporting, and responding to workplace violence incidents.
policies.content: Version 3.0 of the Workplace Violence Response policy outlines definitions, roles and responsibilities, reporting channels, immediate response steps, and post-incident support procedures.

policies.title: Workplace Violence Response
policies.summary: Superseded version of the Workplace Violence Response policy, retained for reference.
policies.content: Version 2.1 of the policy, replaced by Version 3.0. Includes earlier escalation paths and contact lists.

policies.title: Workplace Violence Response
policies.content: Legacy policy retained for audit purposes only.

policies.title: Fire Drill Procedure
policies.summary: Standardized fire drill planning, execution, and documentation requirements for all corporate sites.
policies.content: This policy describes the minimum frequency, notification process, roles, and documentation standards for conducting fire drills.

policies.title: Emergency Evacuation Plan
policies.summary: Global standard for evacuating facilities during fire, earthquake, or other emergencies.
policies.content: The Emergency Evacuation Plan defines evacuation routes, assembly areas, and warden responsibilities across all sites.

policies.title: Alarm System Testing and Maintenance
policies.summary: Requirements and schedules for testing fire, intrusion, and panic alarm systems.
policies.content: Defines frequencies, test procedures, responsible roles, and record-keeping for alarm system health checks.

policies.title: Incident Reporting and Investigation
policies.summary: Guidelines for reporting, triaging, and investigating safety and security incidents.
policies.content: Outlines incident categories, reporting channels, investigation steps, and closure criteria.

policies.title: Workplace Violence Prevention Guideline
policies.summary: Supplemental guidance to the Workplace Violence Response policy focusing on prevention and early intervention.
policies.content: Provides managers and employees with tools to recognize early warning signs and de-escalate potential incidents.

policies.title: Remote Site Security Standard
policies.summary: Minimum security and emergency preparedness requirements for remote depots and small satellite sites.
policies.content: Includes standards for mobile patrols, remote monitoring, and emergency contact lists for remote locations.

Visitor slipped near main entrance experiencing minor leg injury. First aid administered on-site.

technicians.name: Alan Brooks
technicians.bio: Senior alarm systems technician specializing in multi-site intrusion and fire panel diagnostics with over a decade of field experience.

technicians.name: Maria Gonzalez
technicians.bio: Lead field engineer for Headquarters campuses, experienced in large-scale alarm health checks and failover testing.

technicians.name: Daniel Singh
technicians.bio: Downtown Campus-based technician focused on rapid-response alarm troubleshooting and quarterly health inspections.

technicians.name: Olivia Turner
technicians.bio: High-rated specialist handling complex alarm integrations with access control and CCTV monitoring platforms.

technicians.name: Ryan Patel
technicians.bio: Warehouse-focused technician performing routine alarm system health checks and dock area sensor maintenance.

technicians.name: Emma Watkins
technicians.bio: Field technician and occasional trainer for alarm panel basics and alarm test procedures.

technicians.name: Jacob Miller
technicians.bio: Technician supporting distribution centers with combined alarm and video monitoring health checks.

technicians.name: Sophia Khan
technicians.bio: Senior technician who also delivers practical modules on alarm testing as part of emergency warden training.

technicians.name: Michael Ross
technicians.bio: Remote site technician covering depots and small offices with periodic alarm inspections.

technicians.name: Hannah Larson
technicians.bio: Technician focused on urban office environments, ensuring minimal disruption during daytime alarm checks.

service_appointments.notes: Quarterly alarm system health check for Main Office including panel diagnostics and battery tests.
Semi-annual test of fire alarm panels and notification devices at HQ North.
Warehouse 12 alarm inspection with focus on loading dock pull stations and sirens.
Alarm system health check for Building A and adjacent structures at Downtown Campus.
Follow-up visit to verify resolution of previous panel fault codes.
Pre-course demonstration of alarm panel checks before emergency warden training.
Spot-check of recently replaced smoke detectors on floors 3 and 4.
Combined alarm and CCTV monitoring systems health review for Distribution Center - East.
Planned alarm system health check for HQ South prior to policy audit.
